sentences.english: My best friend and I have known each other since kindergarten.
Making friends as an adult is really hard.
sentences.korean: 어른이 되어 친구를 사귀기는 정말 어려워요.

sentences.english: Everyone is so busy with work and family.
I think quality is more important than quantity when it comes to friends, so I'd rather have three close friends than thirty acquaintances.
sentences.korean: 친구에 관해서는 양보다 질이 중요하다고 생각해요. 지인 30명보다 친한 친구 3명이 나아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
